title: A moment you almost ignored
body: Describe one moment from today that seemed small at first, but might matter more than you think. What made it stick in your mind?

title: A belief under review
body: Pick one belief you hold about work, relationships, or yourself. Where did it come from, and does it still serve you?

title: The unfinished conversation
body: Write the conversation you wish you had. Include what you would say, what you fear hearing back, and what truth you hope emerges.
